description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a smooth, light beige material, likely leather or faux leather. The sofa features a minimalist design with clean lines, a low backrest, and slim, black metal legs that elevate it off the ground. It has two large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, along with an additional loose side cushion for extra comfort. The armrests are straight, padded, and of equal height to the backrest, contributing to the sofa's boxy silhouette. The upholstery appears uniform and unadorned, with subtle seam lines visible on the back and sides. This piece would fit well in contemporary urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale outdoor patios.
description: A modern, light beige leather sofa with slim black metal legs, loose cushions, and a minimalist boxy design. The upholstery is smooth and unpatterned, with straight padded armrests and a low backrest.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large back cushions, two seat cushions, and a loose side cushion, with both armrests visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the seat and back cushions, and the straight armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back panel and the slim black legs at each corner.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armrest, the alignment of the cushions, and the sofa's overall rectangular profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, with an additional loose side cushion; all cushions are uniform in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at both ends, equal in height to the backrest, with a boxy, minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, black metal legs positioned at the corners, straight and exposed, providing a modern and elevated appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions; continuous and unsegmented structure with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth light beige upholstery with no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching; subtle seam lines only.
